name: Almond Mocha Cookie Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Slivered almonds; toasted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 13 x 9-inch pan (33 cm x 23 cm) with shortening. Place a cooling rack on the countertop.
2. For the cookie base, combine brown sugar, shortening, coffee powder, coffee, vanilla, and almond extract in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Beat eggs into the creamed mixture.
3. Combine flour, cocoa, salt, and baking soda. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips and almonds. Spread mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set. Do not overbake. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack. Cut into 2 x 1-1/2 inch bars.
5. For the glaze, combine icing sugar, 2 tablespoons Cold coffee (1 to 2), and 1 tablespoon Coffee-flavored liqueur in a small bowl. Stir until well blended. Add additional coffee if the mixture is too thick to drizzle. Drizzle over cooled cookie bars.
